transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Opening with claim request for flight delay compensation
transcript.text: Hi, I need to file a claim for compensation. My flight was delayed and I want to get the money I'm owed.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you — could you please provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the booking
transcript.text: Nadezhda Crestergate
Thanks, **Nadezhda**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, and can be found in your booking confirmation email.
BAQBEJ

Just to confirm:

- **First name:** Nadezhda
- **Last name:** Crestergate
- **Booking reference:** BAQBEJ

Is that all correct?
Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YYZ → LHR · Thu, Jul 09 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Canada

It seems that a claim has already been submitted on your behalf by l*****@a*****.com (case number **#CCD-1007475-BPSOMC**).

Please refer to this email for status updates.
§W§OPTIONS§I don't know who this is! • Okay
I don't know who this is!
I understand your concern. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, I can create a case for our team to investigate right away. Would you like to continue?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
Could you briefly describe why you believe this claim is **unauthorized** or was filed without your knowledge? Any details you can share will help our team investigate.

transcript.note: Explaining that I never filed before and don't recognize the email
transcript.text: I never filed a claim before. This is the first time I'm trying to file for my delayed flight. I don't recognize that email address.
To route you to the right support team, can you please share your **country of residence**?
Canada
§W§BANNER§Your claim has been submitted! You should hear from a team member within 30 days.
Your reference is **CCD-1007510-SKRLYY**.
§W§BANNER§Please note that an ID verification process will be required if you are deemed eligible for payment.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Assistant has provided a final outcome - fraud investigation case created with reference number CCD-1007510-SKRLYY, will hear back within 30 days. This is a clear handoff to human agents.
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you.
§W§INFO§FEEDBACK

verdict.reasoning: The expected outcome was ELIGIBLE with system code FD-EU-EL-05 and CAD 400.0 compensation. However, the chatbot encountered a duplicate claim scenario and when the passenger disputed knowledge of the existing claim, it escalated the case for fraud investigation rather than processing the eligibility determination. The bot never reached an automated eligibility decision, never quoted an amount, and never provided a system code. This is a clear mismatch with the expected outcome.
